packageName: Private Pilot Evidence Vault & Advisory Review v3.4
advisoryRule: Dean Foley / Barayamal may act as advisory and trusted reviewer for this public-safe control package, but does not replace First Nations authority, privacy approval, Indigenous Data Sovereignty approval, official Toastmasters processes, or a private pilot go/no-go decision.
approvalRule: Do not open real intake, activate a private workspace, hand data to a provider, or scale the pilot until the evidence vault, advisory review boundary, authority meeting record, access rules, and decision gates are approved in a separate private environment.
safetyRule: This public v3.4 evidence vault package is fake/sample only. It must not collect or expose real names, emails, access needs, incidents, official Toastmasters records, member numbers, payments, signatures, authority records, access logs, decision records, or private pilot evidence.
noGoTriggers: Dean or Barayamal advisory review is treated as final First Nations authority.
Real evidence is uploaded to the public static demo, public repository, public screenshots, public CSVs, or fake-data Decidim sandbox.
Authority quorum, IDS/data governance, privacy, role access, or official Toastmasters boundary is missing.
Reviewer notes include real names, contact details, access needs, incidents, official records, payments, member numbers, signatures, or private decisions.
A provider or public reviewer receives real private evidence before contract, authority, privacy, and access approval.
The authority meeting records a go decision without conditions, expiry, no-go triggers, monitoring, support, and closeout owner.

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty
NHMRC Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander research ethics

evidenceVault.proof: Quorum, delegation, decision owner, conditions, expiry, stop triggers
evidenceVault.publicRule: Private vault only; public status can say missing or approved

evidenceVault.proof: Reviewer role, assumptions, advisory findings, unresolved questions, no approval claim
evidenceVault.publicRule: Can publish if it contains no real participant or authority details

evidenceVault.proof: Purpose, benefit, authority to control, data classes, retention, deletion, reporting
Notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, incident response, retention, provider checks
Plain-language notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, support route
evidenceVault.publicRule: Do not publish real participant versions

evidenceVault.proof: Named users, roles, MFA, least privilege, revoke test, no-private-access roles
evidenceVault.publicRule: Never public because it can expose access paths

evidenceVault.proof: Workspace, hosting, backups, exports, delete/restore, logs, admin owner
Backup, export, delete, restore, audit, evidence timestamp
evidenceVault.publicRule: Public can say tested or not tested

evidenceVault.proof: Pause, support, escalation, breach assessment, affected-person route
evidenceVault.publicRule: Never public if based on real scenario

evidenceVault.proof: Forms, payments, member numbers, signatures, charter route outside pilot
evidenceVault.publicRule: Public can state official records remain external

evidenceVault.proof: Contract, fake-data handoff, no production export, access owner
evidenceVault.publicRule: Public can state provider uses fake data only

evidenceVault.proof: Response owner, response clock, support escalation, access support
evidenceVault.publicRule: Do not publish individual support details

evidenceVault.proof: Test request, response owner, correction path, deletion path
evidenceVault.publicRule: Public can show route is tested

evidenceVault.proof: Screenshots, docs, CSV, JSON, public wording, no real data checks
Review date, deletion/retention owner, access revocation, archive decision
evidenceVault.publicRule: Public can state closeout trigger exists

reviewerChecks.task: State advisory role only; no final authority or sole approval
Declare developer/custodian role and any review assumptions
reviewerChecks.doneSignal: Reviewer note separates custody from authority

reviewerChecks.task: Check page, docs, CSV, JSON, screenshots, package files for real data
List missing authority evidence for the private authority group
List unresolved data governance and community benefit questions
List notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, retention, and incident questions
Confirm official records stay outside public and private pilot tools unless approved
Confirm provider scope uses fake/sample data only until contract/access approval
Ask whether participant support and incident pause route is staffed
Remove real names, contact details, access needs, incidents, or private decisions from notes
Escalate any blocked trigger to authority, data, privacy, technical, safety, or official owner
Recommend public demo only, hold, or private authority meeting readiness

authoritySteps.task: Confirm no public page or public file contains real private pilot evidence
Confirm who can approve and who cannot
Treat Dean note as advisory input, not approval
Check every evidence item status and classification
Approve or hold data classes, purpose, access, retention, deletion, reporting
Approve or hold notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, incident, retention
Approve or hold access register, MFA, roles, revoke test
Approve or hold workspace, backups, export, delete, restore, logging
Confirm official records and chartering route stay external
Confirm pause, support, escalation, breach assessment, response clocks
Confirm no production export and provider fake-data lane
Confirm first-72-hour checks and authority checkpoint
Name conditions, owner, expiry, stop triggers, closeout trigger
Record limited private pilot, conditional hold, or no-go

accessRules.allowed: Only public-safe package plus private evidence extracts approved by authority
accessRules.limit: Dean cannot receive unrestricted private vault access

accessRules.allowed: Full private evidence vault only for approved authority members
accessRules.limit: Names and access logs never public

accessRules.allowed: Data governance evidence and data classes only
PIA, notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, incident route
accessRules.limit: No public screenshots of private records

accessRules.allowed: Admin roles, logs, backups, restore evidence, revoke checks
Incident tabletop and support evidence only
Fake/sample package only until contract, authority, privacy, and role access pass
GitHub Pages demo, docs, CSV, JSON with fake/sample data
Official forms, signatures, payments, member numbers, chartering records outside pilot tool
Support owner sees only what is needed to support participant request
Private access logs and evidence change log only for approved reviewers
Aggregate status, blockers, next owner type, no real evidence

decisionGates.evidence: All public files pass fake/sample and redaction checks
Advisory note is public-safe and clearly non-authority
Named First Nations authority and delegation exists
Data classes, purpose, access, retention, deletion, reporting approved
PIA, notice, consent, withdrawal, correction, incident route approved
Access register, MFA, backup, export, delete, restore, logs approved
Official Toastmasters records remain external or approved pathway exists
Pause, support, breach assessment, response clocks approved

decisionGates.gate: Activation drill rerun with private evidence
decisionGates.evidence: v3.2 drill rerun with approved private evidence and signoff matrix
All blocked gates closed, conditions/expiry/monitor/closeout recorded
